data.title: Unit 1B: Animals - Lesson 1: That is a lion.
data.desc:
- wild animals: lion, tiger, bear, zebra
- Demonstrative pron: this, that.
- sound /aɪ/ eye, lion
- What's this/that? This/ That is a lion.

data.title: Unit 1B: Animals - Lesson 2: Those are lions and zebras.
data.desc:
- wild animals: lion, tiger, bear, zebra (R), frog, bat, snake.
- Demonstrative pron: these, those
- sound /aɪ/ kite, lion (R)
- What are these/ those? These/ Those are lions and zebras.

data.title: Unit 1B: Animals - Lesson 3: These are lions and zebras.

data.title: Unit 1B: Animals - Lesson 4: This is a pig.

- farm animals: chicken, duck, pig, cow, horse, goat 
- sound /aʊ/ cow, house
- What's this/that? This/ That is a pig.
- What are these/ those? These/ Those are cows and horses.

data.title: Unit 2B: Food - Lesson 1: What food do you like?
data.desc:

- sound /eɪ/ snake, potato
- What food do you like? I like fish and beef.
